title: The Jennifer
description: The Jennifer Punta Mita Collection The Jennifer is grounded and artful, a study in balance and form. Crafted with African jade, abacus disk jade, and sculptural triangle heishi accents. The layered greens create depth, texture, and quiet dimension. Anchoring the design is a handmade lotus pendant with subtle Chinoiserie influence, a timeless symbol of resilience and grace. The interplay of structured shapes and organic elements gives this piece a modern yet enduring presence. Each necklace is handmade and entirely one of a kind. Natural variations in the stones and organic imperfections are inherent to its character, no two pieces are exactly alike. 18″ length with gold clasp and handmade lotus pendant. Lifestyle visuals are created using AI-assisted creative direction.Each necklace is han
